title: Context of the organization
question: Has the organization identified internal and external issues relevant to its AI Management System?
expected_evidence: business, legal, technical, and stakeholder context

title: Interested parties
question: Has the organization identified interested parties and their relevant AI-related requirements?
expected_evidence: customer, user, management, and authority requirements

title: AIMS scope
question: Has the organization defined the scope and boundaries of the AI Management System?
